calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jenny D. Basinger, Esq., Mayall Hurley, Telephone 209-477-3833, appearing for Plaintiff
Christina J. Tantoy, Esq., Stokes Wagner, Telephone 415-943-9471, appearing for Defendant KHRG Sutter Union, LLC;

The Court discusses Plaintiff's counsel's failure to meet its burden to convince the Court that the award of attorneys fees sought is reasonable. Plaintiff's counsel submits to the Court a supplemental declaration regarding plaintiff's attorney's fees and costs. The Court reviews the supplemental declaration on the bench.

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court vacates its tentative ruling.

MOATAZ MAASRANI Motion For Approval Of Paga Settlement is granted. Plaintiff's counsel is to submit a proposed order that is approved as to form and complies with CRC 3.1312. The order is to incorporate the second sentence of the Court's tentative ruling and state that the Court further finds that the amount of attorneys fees and costs sought is reasonable.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Set For Trial On Mar-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant KHRG Sutter Union, LLC's motion to compel arbitration is denied as moot. The only remaining claims in this case after Mr. Maasrani's dismissal of June 20, 2018 are not arbitrable. Mr. Maasrani is now only pursuing a PAGA representative action for civil penalties. (Esparza v. KS Industries, L.P. (2017) 13 Cal.App.5th 1228, 1241-1242.) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torrano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant KHRG Sutter Union, LLC's motion to stay action pending aribitration is denied as moot. The only remaining claims in this case after Mr. Maasrani's dismissal of June 20, 2018 are not arbitrable. Mr. Maasrani is now only pursuing a PAGA representative action for civil penalties. (Esparza v. KS Industries, L.P. (2017) 13 Cal.App.5th 1228, 1241-1242.) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312.
